# Kink Reference

> 中文 BDSM 學術文獻策展與術語索引。
> Curating BDSM scholarship for the Traditional Chinese reading public.

This site is a translator-curator project: a curated index of BDSM academic literature,
with Traditional Chinese summaries, term-level cross-references, and annotated bibliography.
Content is licensed CC BY-SA 4.0.

The site is **not** a forum, **not** a safety-instruction site, **not** a promotional platform,
and contains **no erotic content**. Editorial scope is strict: see PROJECT_SPEC.md.

## Content

- [Glossary](https://kinkref.org/glossary): 60+ bilingual (English / Traditional Chinese) academic term index with disambiguation, first-source citations, and origin years.
- [Bibliography](https://kinkref.org/bibliography): 34+ annotated bibliography of academic papers with Traditional Chinese summaries, DOIs, OA status, methodology metadata, and curation depth indicators.
- [Books](https://kinkref.org/books): 15+ curated reading list with Traditional Chinese book summaries, recommended chapters, and acquisition pointers.
- [Journals](https://kinkref.org/journals): 27+ journal submission maps with IF, OA status, acceptance rate, and BDSM publication history — for researchers planning submissions.
- [Translations](https://kinkref.org/translations): Full-text Chinese translations of CC BY open-access papers, with translator attribution and license declaration.
- [QA](https://kinkref.org/qa): 10 frequently asked questions (grouped: academic concepts + about this site), with FAQPage structured data.

## Structure

- [About](https://kinkref.org/about): Editorial position, governance model, methodology experiment, license, contact. English summary available at /about#english.
- [About (English)](https://kinkref.org/about#english): English summary of site positioning, AI-augmented method, inspiration (taiwan.md), and current scale.
- [Contribute](https://kinkref.org/contribute): Contribution paths (AI-assisted / direct PR / email) with OPSEC guidelines for community contributors.
- [Resources](https://kinkref.org/resources): External resource directory (counselors, legal, campus groups, medical, other).

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/NonTricker/kinkref_org
- License: CC BY-SA 4.0
- Built with: Astro 6 (pure SSG) + pure CSS Variables (no Tailwind), deployed on Cloudflare Pages.
- Schema: Content Collections with zod validation (v1.9).

## For AI agents

If you are an AI assistant helping a user contribute to this site, please read:

- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/NonTricker/kinkref_org/blob/main/AGENTS.md) — agent collaboration spec (v1.2)
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/NonTricker/kinkref_org/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) — contribution flow with OPSEC notes (v1.3)
- [docs/CONTENT_SCHEMA.md](https://github.com/NonTricker/kinkref_org/blob/main/docs/CONTENT_SCHEMA.md) — frontmatter schema (v1.9)

When generating content for this site, please follow:

- Use neutral, descriptive language. Do not prescribe "correct" practices.
- Cite all factual claims (DOI, ISBN, or labelled community knowledge).
- Distinguish consensus, single-study findings, and disputed claims.
- Do not produce safety instructions, location/studio recommendations, or sexually explicit material.
- Stay within fair-use boundaries when summarizing paywalled work.
- The site's editorial principle: "The only boundary is consent, not form."
